summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of payment method customization feature. All features working correctly: icon type selection (Simple/Brand), brand icons (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, PayPal, Efectivo, Banco, Dólar, Euro), color palette for background and text, real-time preview, and persistence of changes. Payment buttons display correctly in both Settings and Payment Screen.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login with Admin PIN 0000 - navigates to Dashboard
Frontend: Navigation to Config > Ventas > Formas de Pago
Frontend: Payment methods display with custom colors (green, blue, purple, cyan, gray)
Frontend: Edit dialog opens when clicking edit button on payment method card
Frontend: Icon type selection - 'Icono Simple' shows Lucide icons (Billetes, Tarjeta, Teléfono, Banco, Dólar)
Frontend: Icon type selection - 'Marca/Procesador' shows brand icons (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, PayPal, Efectivo, Banco, Dólar, Euro)
Frontend: Color palette for background color - 10+ color options available
Frontend: Color palette for text color - 4 options (white, black, cream, light green)
Frontend: Real-time preview updates when changing icon, color, or name
Frontend: New payment method dialog works correctly
Frontend: Payment Screen (PROCESAR PAGO) displays styled buttons with correct colors
Frontend: Exchange rate badges shown on foreign currency methods (USD 1=64, EUR 1=70)
Frontend: Quick amounts section displays correctly (100, 200, 500, 1000, 2000, 5000, EXACTO)
Backend: GET /api/payment-methods returns correct data with bg_color, text_color, icon_type, brand_icon fields
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. 6 payment methods configured with custom colors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment method customization feature fully tested and working. The flow is: 1) Go to Config > Ventas > Formas de Pago, 2) Click edit on any payment method or '+ Agregar' for new, 3) Select icon type (Simple or Brand), 4) Choose icon from grid, 5) Select background and text colors, 6) Preview updates in real-time, 7) Save changes. Payment buttons appear styled in both Settings and Payment Screen.

payment_method_customization.lucide_icons: WORKING - 5 icons: Billetes, Tarjeta, Teléfono, Banco, Dólar
payment_method_customization.brand_icons: WORKING - 9 brands: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, PayPal, Efectivo, Banco, Dólar, Euro
payment_method_customization.text_color_palette: WORKING - 4 colors: white, black, cream, light green
payment_method_customization.real_time_preview: WORKING - Preview updates immediately when changing any setting
payment_method_customization.persistence: WORKING - Changes saved to database and displayed correctly

payment_screen_display.styled_buttons: WORKING - Buttons display with custom colors and icons
payment_screen_display.exchange_rate_badges: WORKING - Foreign currency methods show exchange rate

settings_display.payment_method_grid: WORKING - Cards display with custom colors
settings_display.hover_actions: WORKING - Edit and delete buttons appear on hover
